describe.confidence_note: Strong clarity from prior brainstorm session. All three components well-defined. Prior art search confirmed no existing mechanisms to build on — clean greenfield within existing patterns.

specify.confidence_note: Clear 3-component spec with 10 ACs. Work graph is straightforward. Minor uncertainty: exact debrief UX flow for linked blueprints may need refinement during challenge.

challenge.confidence_note: Elder converged at 0.82. 10 findings (0 critical, 3 high, 5 medium, 2 low). 8 vault analogies consulted. 3 tensions resolved. No regression needed — all findings are spec amendments, not architectural changes.

edge_cases.confidence_note: Elder converged at 0.85. 11 boundaries found (6 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM). 6 addressed with spec amendments, 4 documented as notes, 1 accepted. Critical finding: B3 schema drift (current_stage is string, not integer) must be corrected before W1.

premortem.confidence_note: 4 NEW operational findings, 1 COVERED. Low overlap (0.20) confirms different failure class. PM-1 (context exhaustion) and PM-3 (prompt burial) are the highest-impact operational risks. All mitigated with spec amendments.

review.skip_reason: Family debate (5 agents x 2 stages) + pre-mortem provided comprehensive coverage. 25 total findings across 3 independent lenses converged. External review unlikely to surface new critical findings.

test.confidence_note: 33 test specs across 6 categories. Categories A-B automatable in test.sh (8 new checks). Categories C-F behavioral. T-D1 through T-D10 cover link-blueprint thoroughly. T-F6 (half-linked repair) is the highest-value behavioral test.

execute.confidence_note: All 6 WUs complete. test.sh passes (75/75). All stage count references updated. Schema drift corrected.

debrief.confidence_note: Full debrief with 4 deferred items, 4 discoveries, reflection captured. First use of the debrief stage itself — bootstrapping validation.
debrief.spec_delta_summary: No regressions. 25 amendments applied across 3 review stages (challenge, edge cases, pre-mortem). All additive.
deferred_items: Shell hook enforcement for debrief (jq dependency blocks)
discoveries: current_stage is string in all live files despite integer schema — pre-existing drift corrected
Enforcement tier honesty: tier 2.5 is the right framing for behavioral enforcement
Commit signal original design (prompt every commit) would train dismissal — session-flag opt-in is better
Debrief has universal value for ALL blueprints, not just meta-coordinated ones
